scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:generate --workspace=web && turbo run build --filter=web
scripts.dev: npm run db:prepare -w web && turbo run dev
scripts.db:reset:deploy: npm run db:generate -w web && node scripts/run-reset-deploy-data.mjs
scripts.db:seed:deploy: npm run db:generate -w web && node scripts/seed-deploy-accounts.mjs && node scripts/seed-clean-production-data.mjs && node scripts/verify-deploy-seed.mjs
scripts.db:seed-login-only:deploy: npm run db:generate -w web && node scripts/seed-login-accounts-only.mjs
scripts.db:reset-and-seed:deploy: npm run db:generate -w web && node scripts/reset-and-seed-deploy.mjs
